section.title: Modules
section.description: Activate or deactivate functional modules for this tenant. Disabled modules hide their pages and reject server calls without deleting any data.

toggle.error: We could not change the module state
toggle.noPermission: Only the administrator can change module activation

notActivated: This feature is not active for your tenant

copilot.label: Co-pilot
copilot.description: Tenant-scoped conversational analytics. When off, the Co-pilot screen is hidden and the chat stops responding.

operationsCenter.label: Operations Center
operationsCenter.description: Cross-site operational diagnostics: fiscal health, cash, inventory drift and support bundles. When off, the Operations Center is hidden.

quotations.label: Quotations
quotations.description: Manager flow to draft, send and convert quotations. When off, the Quotations screen is hidden and the feature becomes inactive.

anomalyDetection.label: Anomaly Detection
anomalyDetection.description: Detector for void rate, refund amounts, ticket spikes and no-sale sessions. When off, the dashboard tile is hidden.

semanticSearch.label: Semantic Search
semanticSearch.description: Meaning-based product search and category suggestion. When off, the smart-search button on Products is hidden.

posTouch.label: POS Touch surface
posTouch.description: Touch-optimized POS layout for tablets. When on, it appears in the sidebar and loads the touch sales surface.

kds.label: KDS surface
kds.description: Fullscreen kitchen display for kitchen staff. When on, it becomes available without affecting the sales screen.

customerDisplay.label: Customer Display
customerDisplay.description: Second-screen cart mirror facing the customer. When on, the customer display becomes available.

mobileWaiter.label: Mobile Waiter
mobileWaiter.description: Phone-width layout for waitstaff taking orders at the table. When on, the waiter view becomes available.

eventsApi.label: Public events API
eventsApi.description: Publishes business events (sales, refunds, inventory adjustments, cash closures and fiscal documents) for an external integration to subscribe to. When off, no events are recorded.

delivery.label: Delivery orders
delivery.description: Operational queue for delivery orders with status columns and courier assignment. When on, the Delivery screen becomes available.
